hero.subtitle: Portfolio 2026
hero.description: Frontend & Mobile Developer crafting high-performance digital experiences with a focus on usability, scalability, and modern design.

projects.label: Latest Works
projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.desc: A curated collection of digital experiences, focusing on performance, aesthetics, and user impact.

p1.title: EcoSmart Nexus
p1.fullDescription: A centralized dashboard for monitoring and managing home energy consumption in real-time.
p1.problem: Users lacked a clear, intuitive way to visualize their energy usage across multiple devices, leading to inefficiencies.
p1.solution: Developed a responsive dashboard that aggregates data from IoT devices, providing actionable insights.
p1.learnings: Mastered real-time data synchronization and advanced charting techniques.

p2.title: Aurora Streams
p2.fullDescription: A cross-platform mobile application for high-fidelity audio and video streaming.
p2.problem: Existing streaming solutions were either too heavy or lacked seamless offline transition capabilities.
p2.solution: Built a lightweight core using React Native and implemented a robust caching layer.
p2.learnings: Deepened understanding of mobile performance optimization and platform-specific feature handling.

p3.title: Elevate CRM
p3.fullDescription: A comprehensive CRM system tailored for small to medium enterprises.
p3.problem: SMEs were overwhelmed by complex, expensive CRM systems that didn't fit their specific workflows.
p3.solution: Designed a modular CRM architecture that allows businesses to toggle features based on their needs.
p3.learnings: Focused on user experience design for enterprise software and database normalization at scale.

p4.title: Vertex Finance
p4.fullDescription: A high-performance financial analytics platform for tracking crypto portfolios.
p4.problem: Market volatility requires real-time updates and precise modeling that standard dashboards couldn't provide.
p4.solution: Implemented a custom WebGL-based rendering engine for large-scale data visualization.
p4.learnings: Gained expertise in WebGL and high-frequency data processing in the browser.

p5.title: Prism Analytics
p5.fullDescription: An end-to-end analytics suite for e-commerce platforms to track conversion funnels.
p5.problem: E-commerce owners struggled to identify exactly where in the checkout process they were losing customers.
p5.solution: Created a granular funnel tracking system with event-based logging and automated reports.
p5.learnings: Explored advanced SQL queries for funnel analysis and integrated multi-factor authentication.

story.title: About me
story.text: Graduate in Information Technology with experience in frontend development and mobile applications. Skilled in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and React Native (Expo), with experience integrating REST APIs, user authentication, and optimization using Cloudflare. Focused on building functional, secure, and user-centered (UI/UX) applications, with the ability to quickly adapt to new technologies.

values.title: Philosophy
values.v3_desc: Total focus on the final user experience.

contact.subtitle: Tell me about your idea and let's work together to turn it into a professional, modern, and functional digital solution.

email_panel.title: Send me an email
email_panel.desc: Fill out the form and your email client will open with a pre-filled message.
email_panel.v1_desc: I commit to replying to your email within 24 hours.
email_panel.v2_desc: You'll receive a clear proposal with scope, timelines, and pricing.
email_panel.v3_desc: Every step of the project is recorded in writing.

wa_panel.title: Message me on WhatsApp
wa_panel.desc: Fill out the form and WhatsApp will open with your message ready to send.
wa_panel.v1_desc: Talk to me directly, no intermediaries.
wa_panel.v2_desc: Fast support during business hours to answer your questions.
wa_panel.v3_desc: Send me designs, mockups, or references directly via chat.
